description_long: This object represents a security guard figure, characterized by angular and faceted surfaces with a predominantly dark color palette. The upper section appears to have a brownish element, possibly representing a hat or hair, while the rest of the form is composed of muted gray and black tones, suggesting a uniform. The figure is blocky and abstract, lacking detailed anatomical features, but the overall silhouette implies a human form. There are no visible accessories, insignia, or equipment, and the surface finish is matte with a hard, slightly rough texture. The object is solid and does not appear to have any openings or interactive components. Its size and proportions are consistent with a standing adult human.
description: A blocky, abstract security guard figure with a dark, matte uniform and a brownish upper section, lacking detailed features or accessories.
description_view_0: The brownish upper section is most visible, with angular, overlapping surfaces suggesting the head and shoulders.
description_view_1: A mostly flat, dark gray surface dominates, with little detail visible, likely representing the back or side of the figure.
description_view_2: A smooth, muted gray area with minimal features, possibly the side or back of the figure.
description_view_3: A sharp black edge and gray surfaces are visible, with angular transitions, likely showing the lower body or side.
attribute_uniform_type: The uniform consists of a dark, matte shirt and pants with a brownish upper section that may represent a hat or hair, lacking visible formal accessories or standard insignia.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with a rigid, neutral stance and arms close to the body.
